task: Explain why RAG can still fail even when relevant information exists.

tool_calls.input: Explain why RAG can still fail even when relevant information exists.
Explain why RAG can still fail even when relevant information exists.
tool_calls.output: RAG can fail even when relevant information exists due to poor chunking or similarity search errors (chunk_0), which can lead to the retrieval of incorrect context. This highlights the strong dependence on retrieval quality for RAG's effectiveness. Insufficient evidence in retrieved context.

final_answer: RAG can fail even when relevant information exists due to poor chunking or similarity search errors (chunk_0), which can lead to the retrieval of incorrect context. This highlights the strong dependence on retrieval quality for RAG's effectiveness. Insufficient evidence in retrieved context.
